Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Per-project Docker containers with workers as tmux windows (#59) (#59)

Replace the single privileged workspace container with per-project sibling
containers managed by the captain via the host Docker socket. Each project
gets its own isolated container, filesystem, and tmux server. Workers are
now tmux windows inside a project's `agents` session instead of separate
tmux sessions on a shared server.

New scripts: start-project, stop-project, list-projects, create-worker
Removed: launch-worker, setup-project (replaced by above)
Updated: list-workers, capture-worker-output, send-keys-to-worker,
archive-worker (now take PROJECT_NAME parameter)

Voice server and pane monitor dynamically discover project sockets via
PROJECTS_SOCKETS_DIR instead of a fixed WORKSPACE_TMUX_SOCKET.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix git clone: drop -X POST so curl stays POST through GAS 302 redirect

curl with -X POST + -L follows the 302 redirect as GET (RFC 2616),
causing an empty response from googleusercontent.com. Removing -X POST
and using --data alone is sufficient: curl infers POST from the body
and keeps the method through the redirect. GITHUB_TOKEN now reliably
extracted for HTTPS clone on fresh machines like NeilWin WSL.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix in-app docs: copy markdown to public/ at build time

The API route using fs.readFileSync fails on Vercel because content/docs/
files aren't bundled into serverless functions. Instead, a prebuild script
copies them to public/docs-content/ as static assets.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: initialize CO roster from crew-status.json after Matrix connect

The CO star badge was never applied because:
1. sendRosterSignal sent bot IDs instead of ASSISTANT_NAME (fixed in prev commit)
2. Even with correct names, roster signals arrive before the bot connects
3. The bot always started with 🟢, never checking if it should be ⭐

Now after Matrix connect, the bot reads crew-status.json (generated at
deploy time) to populate roomRoster and determine initial CO status.
Runtime !roster join/leave signals continue to update CO dynamically.

commit.message:
fix: redirect subscribe CTAs to /assinar instead of /auth/login

Users can now subscribe without logging in first. The /assinar page
has a direct checkout form that creates user + Asaas subscription
in one step. After payment, user receives magic login link via
email and WhatsApp.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix stuck detection: fire on time alone, not on transfer ID presence

Stuck detection was gated on _transfer_id is not None, meaning if the
filename comparison failed for any reason, the 10-minute timeout never
fired and the download would hang for the full 60-minute loop.

Now the time check runs unconditionally (just needs completed=0, failed=0).
If _transfer_id is available, we also cancel the slskd transfer; otherwise
we just mark as stuck and return. Same fix applied to both album and track
poll functions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Restrict XP awards — no XP for casual observation

GM was awarding XP for looking at noticeboards, shrines, and trivial
actions by interpreting "first-time discoveries" too broadly.

New rules:
- XP only for genuine achievement: quests, combat, solved mysteries,
  major social victories, first arrival at significant new locations
- Explicit DO NOT list: looking around, reading signs, examining objects,
  casual conversation, routine actions
- Calibrated amounts: weak combat 10-20, quests 50-150, etc.
- Rule of thumb: when in doubt, give no XP

feat(earnings): institutional quality — enriched modal + full pre-warm pipeline

EarningsModal enhancements:
- YoY EPS growth, beat history visuals (✓ ✗ ✓ ✓), beat streak from Alpha Vantage
- Up to 4 Finnhub news headlines with source + time
- Richer 4-5 sentence AI analysis (400 tokens, Claude Haiku)
- Pre-warm daemon: AV history + news + AI cached before modal opens
- Partial pre-warm for Pending AMC tonight entries

Backend reliability:
- Named constants block (_EARNINGS_AI_MODEL, _AV_RATE_INTERVAL_SECS, etc.)
- Structured logging — _logger.warning on all 3 exception paths
- Anthropic singleton with double-checked locking (thread-safe)
- ThreadPoolExecutor (max 4 workers) replaces unbounded raw threads
- _av_get() rate-limit serializer (≥13s between calls, raises on Note response)
- _with_retry() for Finnhub transient errors
- Fix amc_tonight missing from earnings-analysis router bucket search
- Fixed ALPHAVANTAGE_API_KEY env var name mismatch

Frontend:
- AbortController with 20s timeout + cleanup on unmount
- ErrorBoundary wrapping EarningsModal (key-reset per ticker)
- Accessibility: aria-labelledby, aria-label on news links, focus-visible on close
- Renamed tile to "Earnings"
- Modal max-height + overflow-y for small screens
- Mixed verdict neutral styling, correct verdictLabel

Security / observability:
- slowapi rate limiting: 10/min on /api/earnings-analysis/{sym}
- Sentry SDK conditional init (no-op without SENTRY_DSN)

Tests:
- 15 unit tests for _generate_earnings_analysis (YoY, beat streak, degradation, cache)
- 2 integration tests for earnings router (amc_tonight bucket, unknown sym)
- 70/70 passing

Fix deal type classification and normalize units

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Re-hydrate case steps from templates on localStorage load to restore approach-specific workflows

Cases loaded from localStorage were using stale cached steps instead of
re-deriving from situation templates. This caused self-represented and
legal counsel steps to appear identical or incorrect. Now the persist
merge function runs rehydrateCase on every case, ensuring the correct
approach-specific steps (self/legal/pre) are always applied while
preserving user progress (done states, notes, checks, action progress,
bid collections). Also fixes additional approaches not being re-hydrated.

commit.message:
Switch SW to stale-while-revalidate and auto-reload on update

Serve cached assets immediately but fetch from network in background
to keep the cache fresh. On next visit after deploy, the new SW
installs (skipWaiting), activates (clients.claim), and the
controllerchange listener auto-reloads the page so users always get
the latest version.

Meteoro X v7.2: Rate limiting + retry backoff for Gemini 429

- Add per-provider semaphore (Gemini max 3 concurrent calls)
- Add retry with exponential backoff on 429 errors (2s, 4s, 8s)
- Skip to next provider on 402 Payment Required (DeepSeek)
- Batch agents in groups of 3 with 1.5s delay between batches
- Increase timeouts: 60s total, 20s per agent

commit.message:
fix(cafe-ui): compact Submission Rack, collapsible metadata editor

The metadata cards were taking over the viewport, hiding the gallery
grid below. With 4+ photos selected, you couldn't see any more photos
to select.

Redesign:
- Rack is now compact: 56px thumbnails in a row + inline action buttons
- Thumbnails show validation status (green=valid, yellow=needs metadata)
- Click a thumbnail to edit that photo's metadata (one at a time)
- "Edit" button toggles metadata panel (280px max, scrollable)
- "Hide" collapses it back to just thumbnails
- Descriptions auto-truncated to 300 chars on selection (was overflowing)
- Alt text generation button stays accessible in compact mode
